source_pr.title: *: begin opentracing from dispatch() and change interface to Execute(ctx, sql)
source_pr.body:
If we start trace from `session.Execute()`,  some background session would make a lot of noise. 
`server.dispatch` should be a better beginning for each trace.

symptoms: rs, err := se.Execute(goCtx, "select * from t order by col limit 50") (bench_test.go)
failure_signature: rs, err := se.Execute(goCtx, "select * from t order by col limit 50") (bench_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: rs, err := se.Execute(goCtx, "select * from t order by col limit 50") (bench_test.go)

files: bench_test.go, bootstrap.go, cmd/benchdb/main.go, ddl/ddl_db_change_test.go, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, ddl/delete_range.go, ddl/util/util.go, executor/distsql_test.go, executor/grant.go, executor/join_test.go, executor/set_test.go, executor/simple.go, executor/simple_test.go, new_session_test.go, plan/dag_plan_test.go, plan/preprocess_test.go, privilege/privileges/cache.go, privilege/privileges/privileges_test.go, server/conn.go, server/driver.go, server/driver_tidb.go, server/tidb_test.go, session.go, statistics/ddl.go, statistics/histogram.go, statistics/update.go, store/tikv/gcworker/gc_worker.go, store/tikv/sql_test.go, table/tables/tables_test.go, tidb_test.go, util/sqlexec/restricted_sql_executor.go, util/testkit/testkit.go
